# We Do Not Sleep

> [!info] 💧 Event · Cost: **5** · Spirit

---

**Action:** Until the end of the phase, **_Rohan_** characters do not exhaust to commit to quests.

---

> *"But we must ride more warily; for war is abroad, and the Rohirrim, the Horse-lords, do not sleep, even if it seems so from afar."*
